projects.title: OTT Merger Analysis
projects.desc:
Web development is the process of building, creating, and maintaining websites and web applications. It ranges from developing simple single static pages of plain text to complex web applications, electronic businesses, and social network services. 
Wikipedia
Wikipedia
 +4
Core Specializations
Web development is typically categorized into three main areas:
Front-End Development: Focuses on the "client-side," which is everything a user sees and interacts with in a browser. Key technologies include HTML for structure, CSS for styling, and JavaScript for interactivity.
Back-End Development: Focuses on the "server-side," handling the logic, database interactions, and server configuration. Common languages include Python, PHP, Node.js, and Ruby.
Full-Stack Development: Involves proficiency in both front-end and back-end technologies, allowing a developer to build an entire application from start to finish. 
W3Schools
W3Schools
 +6
Essential Tools & Technologies
Frameworks & Libraries: Tools like React, Angular, and Vue.js (Front-end) or Django, Express.js, and Laravel (Back-end) provide pre-written code to speed up development.
Version Control: Git and platforms like GitHub are used to track code changes and collaborate with other developers.
Databases: Systems like MySQL or PostgreSQL (Relational/SQL) and MongoDB (NoSQL) store and organize website data.
Code Editors: Visual Studio Code (VS Code) is the most widely used environment for writing and debugging code. 
GeeksforGeeks
GeeksforGeeks
 +6
Learning Paths
Self-Directed Learning: Platforms like W3Schools, MDN Web Docs, and The Odin Project offer free, comprehensive guides for beginners.
Structured Courses: Providers like Coursera, Udemy, and Codecademy offer certifications from universities and tech leaders like Google and Meta.
projects.content:

Key technologies include HTML for structure, CSS for styling, and JavaScript for interactivity. Back-End Development: Focuses on the "server-side," handling the logic, database interactions, and server configuration.

Common languages include Python, PHP, Node.js, and Ruby. Full-Stack Development: Involves proficiency in both front-end and back-end technologies, allowing a developer to build an entire application from start to finish.
